display_name: Multiple Failed Recharges per Subscriber
rule_description: Multiple Failed Recharges per Subscriber
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(*) err_count from air_error_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' group by served_msisdn  having  count(*) > 200 order by err_count desc

display_name: Long Duration On-net & Off-net call
rule_description: Control for Long Duration On-net & Off-net call
query_expr: select served_msisdn, original_dur from rafms.eric_msc_fct  where xdr_date between '$p{start_date}' and '$p{end_date}' and  event_type_key ='1'  and event_direction_key='1' and original_dur >= 8100

display_name: High duration of voice calls for postpaid subscribers
rule_description: Control for High duration of voice calls for postpaid subscribers
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(original_dur) call_duration from rafms.eric_ccn_scf_fct where xdr_date between '$p{start_date}' and '$p{end_date}' and srv_type_key='1' and event_type_key = '1' group by served_msisdn having sum(original_dur) > 50000

display_name: High number of voice calls for postpaid subscribers
rule_description: Control for High number of voice calls for postpaid subscribers
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) call_count from rafms.eric_ccn_scf_fct where xdr_date between '$p{start_date}' and '$p{end_date}' and srv_type_key='1' and event_type_key = '1' group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 200

display_name: High Duration of International calls
rule_description: Control for High Duration of International calls by a subscriber
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(original_dur) as call_duration from rafms.eric_gmsc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key ='1' and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='3' and group by served_msisdn having sum(original_dur) > 5000

display_name: High Number of Satellite Calls
rule_description: Control for High Number of Satellite Calls
query_expr: select a.served_msisdn, count(1) call_count from (select served_msisdn, other_msisdn, other_msisdn_dial_digit_key, other_msisdn_iso_code, in_tg_id_key, out_tg_id_key, billable_pulse from eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$p{start_date}' and '$p{end_date}' and other_msisdn_dial_digit_key in ('628681', '870', '871', '872', '873', '874', '878', '8711', '8713', '8716', '8721', '8723', '8726', '8731', '8733', '8736', '8741', '8743', '8746', '8810', '8811', '8812', '8813', '8818', '8819', '61140','87139', '87176', '87239', '87276', '87339', '87376', '87439', '87476', '88213', '88220'))a group by a.served_msisdn having count(1) > 1

display_name: Staff providing single high value adjustment
rule_description: Control for Staff providing single high value adjustment
query_expr: select served_msisdn, origin_operator_id, service_class, external_data1, transaction_amount from air_adjustment_fct WHERE xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and transaction_type is NULL and transaction_amount > 5000 and (external_data2 like 'Annual_SDT_%' or upper(external_data1) like 'LEGAL%')

display_name: High Duration of International Call forwards
rule_description: Control for High Duration of International Call forwards
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(original_dur) call_duration from eric_gmsc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key ='5'  and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='3' group by served_msisdn having sum(original_dur) > 4500

display_name: High value of credits received by a subscriber
rule_description: Control for High value of credits received by a subscriber
query_expr: SELECT served_msisdn, sum(transaction_amount) me2u_received from rafms.air_adjustment_fct  where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and  transaction_type = 'me2u credit transfer' and transaction_code = 'credit' and cast(service_class as int) < 700 group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 15000

display_name: High Number of Voucher recharges without Voice calls
rule_description: Control High Number of Voucher recharges without Voice calls good indicator for voucher theft scenarios
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(*) err_count from air_error_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' group by served_msisdn  having  count(*) > 200 order by err_count desc

display_name: High Number of International Call forwards
rule_description: Control for High Number of International Call forwards
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(*) call_count from eric_gmsc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key ='5'  and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='3' group by served_msisdn having count(*) > 20

display_name: High Duration of Satellite Calls
rule_description: Control for High Duration of Satellite Calls
query_expr:
select a.served_msisdn, count(1) call_count, sum(a.billable_pulse) billable_pulse from (select served_msisdn, other_msisdn, other_msisdn_dial_digit_key, other_msisdn_iso_code, in_tg_id_key, out_tg_id_key, billable_pulse from eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$p{start_date}' and '$p{end_date}' and event_type_key = '1' and event_direction_key = '1' and other_msisdn_dial_digit_key in ('628681', '870', '871', '872', '873', '874', '878', '8711', '8713', '8716', '8721', '8723', '8726', '8731', '8733', '8736', '8741', '8743', '8746', '8810', '8811', '8812', '8813', '8818', '8819', '61140','87139', '87176', '87239', '87276', '87339', '87376', '87439', '87476', '88213', '88220'))a 
group by a.served_msisdn having sum(a.billable_pulse) > 5

display_name: High number of call conferences
rule_description: Control for High number of call conferences
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) call_cnt from rafms.eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and suppliment_code_key = '81'  group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 10

display_name: High Accumulated Charge of GPRS downloads by home subscribers
rule_description: Control for High Accumulated Charge of GPRS downloads by home subscribers
query_expr: select served_msisdn, round(sum(charge), 2) charge from (select served_msisdn, sum(charge) charge from eric_ccn_gy_post_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key  = '4' group by served_msisdn union select served_msisdn, sum(charge) as charge from eric_ccn_gy_pre_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key  = '4' group by served_msisdn) as m  group by m.served_msisdn having sum(m.charge) > 10000 order by charge desc

display_name: Long Duration International Call
rule_description: Control for Long Duration International Call
query_expr: select served_msisdn, original_duration from eric_gmsc_fct where dr_date between '$p{start_date}' and '$p{end_date}' and event_type_key ='1'  and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='3' and original_duration > 3600

display_name: High value of SDP adjustments
rule_description: Control for High value of SDP adjustments
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(transaction_amount) as adjustment_value from rafms.air_adjustment_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and transaction_type is null and subscription_type_key is null and transaction_amount > 0  and cast(service_class as int) < 700 group by served_msisdn having sum(transaction_amount) > 5000

display_name: High number of credits given by a subscriber
rule_description: Control for High number of credits given by a subscriber
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) me2u_debit_cnt from rafms.air_adjustment_fct  where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and  transaction_type = 'me2u credit transfer' and transaction_code = 'debit' and cast(service_class as int) < 700 group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 25

display_name: High Duration of off-net Domestic calls
rule_description: Control for High Duration of off-net Domestic calls
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(original_dur) call_duration from rafms.eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and event_type_key ='1' and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='2'group by served_msisdn having sum(original_dur) > 40000

display_name: High value of credits given by a subscriber
rule_description: Control for High value of credits given by a subscriber
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(transaction_amount) me2u_debit from rafms.air_adjustment_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and transaction_type = 'me2u credit transfer' and transaction_code = 'debit' group by served_msisdn having sum(transaction_amount) < -500

display_name: High  number of Call Forwards
rule_description: Control for High  number of Call Forwards
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(original_dur) call_duration from eric_msc_fct WHERE xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key = '5' group by served_msisdn having sum(original_dur) > 1000

display_name: High GPRS Upload Subscribers
rule_description: Control for High GPRS Upload Subscribers
query_expr: select served_msisdn, round(sum(volume_uplink)/1024/1024/1024, 1) volume from (select served_msisdn, sum(data_volume_fbc_uplink) volume_uplink from ggsn_post_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key  = '4' group by served_msisdn union select served_msisdn, sum(data_volume_fbc_uplink) as volume_uplink from ggsn_pre_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key  = '4' group by served_msisdn) as m  group by m.served_msisdn having sum(m.volume_uplink) > 20*1024*1024*1024 order by volume desc

display_name: High Number of off-net Domestic calls
rule_description: Control for High Number of off-net Domestic calls
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) call_cnt from rafms.eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and event_type_key ='1' and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='2'group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 180

display_name: High duration of call conferences
rule_description: Control for High duration of call conferences
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(original_dur) call_duration from rafms.eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and suppliment_code_key = '81'  group by served_msisdn having sum(original_dur) > 3600

display_name: High SDR accumulated for incoming calls to Postpaid Outroamers
rule_description: Control for High SDR accumulated for incoming calls to Postpaid Outroamers
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) og_call_cnt, sum(original_dur) call_dur, sum(charge) call_charge, sum(xdr_charge) xdr_charge from tap_voice_sms_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and cdr_type = 'TAPIN' and event_type_key = '1' and event_direction_key = '2' and served_msisdn in (select served_msisdn from rafms.sdp_subscriber_fct WHERE xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and cast(serviceclassid as int) >= 700) GROUP BY served_msisdn HAVING sum(xdr_charge) > 20

display_name: High number of MMS
rule_description: Control for High number of MMS
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(call_cnt) as mms_call_cnt from (select served_msisdn, count(*) call_cnt from ggsn_post_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key = '3' group by served_msisdn union select served_msisdn, count(*) call_cnt from ggsn_pre_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key = '3' group by served_msisdn) as ggsn group by served_msisdn having sum(call_cnt) > 800

display_name: High number of credits received by a subscriber
rule_description: Control for High number of credits received by a subscriber
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) me2u_cnt, sum(transaction_amount) me2u_amt from rafms.air_adjustment_fct  where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and transaction_type = 'me2u credit transfer' and transaction_code = 'credit' and cast(service_class as int) < 700 group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 30 and sum(transaction_amount) > 8000

display_name: High SDG accumulated for all voice outgoing calls by Postpaid Outroamers
rule_description: Control for High SDG accumulated for all voice outgoing calls by Postpaid Outroamers
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) og_call_cnt, sum(original_dur) call_dur, sum(charge) call_charge, sum(xdr_charge) xdr_charge from tap_voice_sms_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and cdr_type = 'TAPIN' and event_type_key = '1' and event_direction_key = '1' and served_msisdn in (select served_msisdn from rafms.sdp_subscriber_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and cast(serviceclassid as int) >= 700) GROUP BY served_msisdn HAVING sum(xdr_charge) > 20

display_name: High Value of Voucher Recharges  without Voice calls
rule_description: Control High Value of Voucher Recharges  without Voice calls good indicator for voucher theft scenarios
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(*) err_count from air_error_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' group by served_msisdn  having  count(*) > 200 order by err_count desc

display_name: High Number of International calls
rule_description: Control for High Number of International calls by a subscriber
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) as call_count from rafms.eric_gmsc_fct where  xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key ='1' and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='3' and group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 100

display_name: High GPRS Downloads Subscribers
rule_description: Control for High GPRS Downloads Subscribers
query_expr: select served_msisdn, round(sum(volume_downlink)/1024/1024/1024, 1) volume from (select served_msisdn, sum(data_volume_fbc_downlink) volume_downlink from ggsn_post_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key  = '4' group by served_msisdn union select served_msisdn, sum(data_volume_fbc_downlink) as volume_downlink from ggsn_pre_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key  = '4' group by served_msisdn) as m  group by m.served_msisdn having sum(m.volume_downlink) > 50*1024*1024*1024 order by volume desc

display_name: High Duration of on-net Domestic calls
rule_description: Control for High Duration of on-net Domestic calls
query_expr: select served_msisdn, sum(original_dur) call_duration from rafms.eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and event_type_key ='1' and event_direction_key='1' and nw_ind_key='1'group by served_msisdn having sum(original_dur) > 50000

display_name: High number of SDP adjustments
rule_description: Control for High number of SDP adjustments
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) as adjustment_count from rafms.air_adjustment_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and  transaction_type is null and subscription_type_key is null and transaction_amount > 0 group by served_msisdn having count(1) > 1

display_name: High number of Call Holds
rule_description: Control for High number of Call Holds
query_expr: select served_msisdn, count(1) call_cnt from rafms.eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and suppliment_code_key = '66'  group by  served_msisdn having count(1) > 10

display_name: High number of SMS
rule_description: Control for High number of SMS
query_expr: select event_date, served_msisdn, count(1) sms_cnt from rafms.eric_msc_fct where xdr_date between '$P{start_date}' and '$P{end_date}' and event_type_key='2' and event_direction_key='1'  group by event_date, served_msisdn having count(1) > 1000
